summary: Backend-only testing of Two-Wheeler Dealership CRM (first iteration). Created pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py with 43 tests covering auth (JWT bearer + cookies), constants/master data, RBAC (super_admin / admin / sales_executive), leads CRUD with round-robin auto-assignment, stage transition validation rules (Deal/Booking/Registration/Lost), follow-ups + counter, timeline events, document upload+download via Emergent Object Storage, user management, and analytics. All 43 tests PASSED against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.

minor.issue: Uses exclude_unset but then filters out values that are None — a field explicitly set to null is silently ignored (e.g., cannot clear assigned_to, payment_mode, notes via PUT). Consider only applying exclude_unset.
Timeline event is hard-coded as 'Deal Updated' for every field change — misleading when only notes/priority/etc. change. Rename to 'Lead Updated'.
Code comment says 'must have passed Booking stage' but no validation is performed — any stage can jump straight to Delivery. Not required by spec but could be tightened.
branch_id validity is checked, but brand_id/model_id/variant_id/color_id are NOT validated against master data — invalid ids silently accepted.
next_followup_date is overwritten with whatever the latest follow-up scheduled_date is (even if older than current). Should only update when scheduled_date > now.
No delete-lead endpoint exists; test leads accumulate. Consider adding DELETE /api/leads/{id} for super_admin.

allow_origins uses FRONTEND_URL env, defaulting to http://localhost:3000. If FRONTEND_URL is not set correctly in production, cookies across subdomains may break. Verified it works for current preview URL.

action_items: Optional: allow explicit null values in PUT /api/leads/{id} so users can clear fields
Optional: rename generic 'Deal Updated' timeline event to 'Lead Updated'
Optional: validate brand_id/model_id/variant_id/color_id references when creating/updating leads
Optional: add DELETE /api/leads/{id} endpoint for super_admin to cleanup test data
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1148 lines — approaching the 700-line limit. Strongly recommend splitting into modules (auth.py, leads.py, masters.py, files.py, analytics.py, seed.py).
Stage transition logic has no enforced progression order (besides per-stage prerequisites). A lead can jump from Inquiry → Registration if a document exists. Consider enforcing allowed next stages.
PUT /api/leads/{id} silently drops fields with value None because of 'if v is not None' filter combined with exclude_unset — this makes clearing a field impossible.
No rate limiting / brute force protection on /api/auth/login (auth_testing.md playbook recommends lockout after 5 fails). Not implemented.
access_token has 12h expiry but refresh_token flow has no /api/auth/refresh endpoint — refresh cookie is set but never used.
put_object/get_object use synchronous requests inside async endpoints — blocks the event loop during uploads/downloads. Use httpx.AsyncClient or run_in_threadpool.
add_timeline event string 'Deal Updated' fired on any lead PUT is misleading when only e.g. notes change.
DELETE endpoints for branches/brands/models/variants/colors do not cascade — deleting a brand leaves orphan models/variants and leads pointing to missing ids.
test_credentials: Read from /app/memory/test_credentials.md — superadmin@dealer.com/super123, admin@dealer.com/admin123, sales1..4@dealer.com/sales123. All seeded and verified working.
seed_data_creation: Seed runs automatically on backend startup: 3 branches (Bilimora/Chikhli/Gandevi), 4 brands (Honda/Hero/TVS/Suzuki) with models+variants, 5 colors, 6 users, 5 sample leads. Seed is idempotent and updates password hashes if they do not match.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend single file /app/backend/server.py. MongoDB DB_NAME=twowheeler_crm, vehicle models live in collection 'vehicle_models' (not 'models'). Auth supports Bearer and cookie. All master data and RBAC rules tested and passing. File upload uses live Emergent Object Storage (APP_NAME=twowheeler-crm) — verified working. Round-robin counter stored in db.rr_counters per branch_id. When testing stage changes, remember: Deal needs deal.customer_expected_price + offered_price, Booking needs payment_mode, Registration needs at least one uploaded document, Lost needs lost_reason.
rca of the issue: No failing tests — nothing to RCA. Backend implementation is functionally correct per problem statement. Minor concerns listed above are code-quality / edge-case improvements, not bugs.
